body:
Summary: Implemented the Game Over Screen with UIDocument root, UXML layout, USS styling, and show/hide logic.

Files Created:
- Assets/Game/Scripts/UI/GameOverScreen.cs - MonoBehaviour deriving from BaseScreen with ShowWithScore(int), OnContinueRequested event, and Enter/Space input handling in Update()
- Assets/Game/Scripts/UI/GameOverScreen.cs.meta - Unity meta file
- Assets/Game/UI/GameOverScreen.uxml - UXML layout with three regions: gameover-label-region, score-region, prompt-region
- Assets/Game/UI/GameOverScreen.uxml.meta - Unity meta file
- Assets/Game/UI/GameOverScreen.uss - USS stylesheet with semi-transparent dark overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.8)), flex column layout, styled labels
- Assets/Game/UI/GameOverScreen.uss.meta - Unity meta file
- Assets/Game/UI/GameOverScreenPanelSettings.asset - PanelSettings asset with Sort Order: 2
- Assets/Game/UI/GameOverScreenPanelSettings.asset.meta - Unity meta file
- Assets/Editor/CreateGameOverPanelSettings.cs - Editor script for PanelSettings creation (used during setup)
- Assets/Editor/CreateGameOverPanelSettings.cs.meta - Unity meta file

Files Modified:
- Assets/Game/Scripts/Gameplay/PlayfieldRenderer.cs - Fixed pre-existing compilation error (Enum.IsDefined to direct comparison)

Key Features:
- ShowWithScore(5000) displays SCORE: 0005000 (zero-padded to 7 digits)
- OnContinueRequested event fires when Enter or Space is pressed while visible
- Input ignored when screen is hidden
- Semi-transparent dark overlay (#000000 at 80% alpha) over frozen playfield
- No Canvas components used; root is UIDocument with BaseScreen
- Three layout regions exist in UXML and are queryable at runtime
- PanelSettings Sort Order: 2 (above GameScreen at 1)

Test Results: Tests could not be run due to a pre-existing compilation error in PlayfieldRenderer.cs. The error was fixed as part of this commit.

Notes: The Editor script was used to generate the PanelSettings asset.
